mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate directly lower the discount rate for equity valuations, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns show no statistically significant positive correlation with FEDFUNDS declines over a 3-year rolling window, or Rank IC falls below 0.02.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly increase in the unemployment rate exceeding 0.2 percentage points signals deteriorating labor market conditions that immediately trigger negative S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: S&P 500 produces positive 5-day returns in more than 55% of instances where UNRATE rises above the 0.2pp threshold.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in real GDP and retail sales confirms broad-based consumer demand strength, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint positive signal fails to predict positive 60-day returns with a win rate above 50% during late-cycle expansion periods, or interaction term coefficient is statistically insignificant.

mechanism_narrative: A month-over-month decline in the index of industrial production below -0.5% indicates supply-side contraction that forces negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns remain positive in over 60% of cases where INDPRO drops below the -0.5% threshold during post-shock recovery phases.

mechanism_narrative: Rising federal funds rates combined with CPI inflation above 4.0% forces aggressive monetary tightening expectations, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: The combined signal yields a negative predictive accuracy below 45% over a 2-year walk-forward test, or the interaction effect vanishes when CPIAUCSL exceeds 4.0%.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained growth in total nonfarm payrolls increases aggregate income and corporate revenue expectations, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns show a negative or zero correlation with PAYEMS growth over any 3-year rolling window, or Rank IC remains below 0.01.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly drop in housing starts below 1.2 million units signals weakening residential investment demand that triggers negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: S&P 500 delivers positive 20-day returns in more than 55% of observations where HOUST drops below the 1.2 million threshold.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent increases in industrial production and real GDP confirm robust supply-side capacity utilization, driving positive S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint positive signal fails to predict positive 5-day returns with a win rate above 52% over a 2-year rolling window, or the interaction term loses statistical significance.
